narrative_beat: Wide de mesa de jantar familiar brasileira com Biblia aberta, celular passando de mao em mao, cores quentes, fundo P&B

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a warm Brazilian family dinner table with an open leather-bound Bible at the center, a smartphone being passed from one anonymous hand to another across the table, plates of food half-eaten, a crimson tablecloth with golden embroidery at edges
subject.focal_point: the smartphone being passed between two hands over the open Bible
subject.secondary: multiple anonymous hands and arms visible around the table edge, warm bread rolls, a clay water pitcher

environment.location: a modest Brazilian family dining room
environment.time_of_day: evening, warm candlelight and overhead lamp
environment.atmosphere: communal mission, sharing the message with your people

composition.foreground: table surface with Bible, phone, and food in warm crimson, ochre, and amber tones
composition.midground: anonymous hands and arms around the table
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white simple house walls with a crucifix and family photo (blurred)

lighting.key_light: warm amber overhead lamp casting pool of light on table center
lighting.rim_light: gold highlights on phone screen and Bible page edges
lighting.shadow_quality: soft warm shadows under table edges, deeper shadows at room walls

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares from candle
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, tablecloth weave visible, bread texture, leather Bible grain, floating orange embers from candle

mood.emotion: communal urgency, share this with your church group and your family

symbolism.primary: the message spreading hand-to-hand through the family unit
symbolism.secondary: open Bible as the foundation truth beneath the modern phone

negative_as_positive: anonymous hands and arms only, no identifiable faces visible
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background walls, warm saturated table foreground only
tack-sharp focus on Bible and phone

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
